mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0601_01-02_1#Sql002 */ A.MENU_ID FROM TB_MED_MENU_PRIV_NEW A INNER JOIN TB_MED_MENU_NEW B ON A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND (B.IS_LEAF = '1' OR B.IS_POPPAGE = '1') WHERE A.PRIV_ID = #{req.privId} ORDER BY A.MENU_ID

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0601_01-02_1#Sql011 */ USER_ID, USER_NM USER_NAME, PASSWORD, LASTPWUPTIME, PRIV_ID, BRANCH_ID SBI_SECURITY_CODE, BROKER_ID BROKER_CODE, SUB_BROKER_ID, EMPLOYEE_ID, EMPLOYEE_NAME, GOVERNOR_FLAG, LOGIN_STATUS, PARTNER_USER_ID, PARTNER_USER_PW, CCS_USER_ID, CCS_USER_PW, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, UPTIMESTAMP_USER UPDATE_USER, UPTIMESTAMP_TIME UPDATE_TIME, MAIL_ADDRESS FROM TB_MED_USERS A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{req.loginId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0601_01-02_1#Sql008 */ INTO TB_MED_USERS ( USER_ID, USER_NM, PASSWORD, LASTPWUPTIME, PRIV_ID, BRANCH_ID, BROKER_ID, SUB_BROKER_ID, EMPLOYEE_ID, EMPLOYEE_NAME, GOVERNOR_FLAG, LOGIN_STATUS, PARTNER_USER_ID, PARTNER_USER_PW, CCS_USER_ID, CCS_USER_PW, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, UPTIMESTAMP_USER, UPTIMESTAMP_TIME, MAIL_ADDRESS ) VALUES ( #{req.loginId}, #{req.userName}, #{req.password}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.privId}, #{req.branchCode}, #{req.brokerCode}, #{req.subBrokerCode}, #{req.employeeId}, #{req.chargeName},
'1',
'0',
'0', null, null, null, null, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.updateUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.mailAddress} )

INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0601_01-02_1#Sql010 */ INTO TB_MED_GOV_MENU_NEW ( USER_ID, MENU_ID, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{req.loginId}, #{req.menuId}, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.updateUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE )

INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0601_01-02_1#Sql012 */ INTO TB_MED_VERIFY_USERS ( USER_ID, MAIL_ADDRESS, VERIFY_STATUS, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_DATE ) WITH M_CODE_ALL AS ( SELECT * FROM M_CODE A WHERE A.CODE_TYPE = '37' AND CODE_1 = '3' AND CODE_2 = #{req.privId} AND START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND (END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') OR END_DATE = NULL) ) SELECT #{req.loginId}, #{req.mailAddress}, '1', #{req.updateUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM M_CODE_ALL)
mapper.delete: DELETE /* @SQLID=SUB0601_01-02_1#Sql009 */ FROM TB_MED_GOV_MENU_NEW A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{req.loginId}
